{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122004082448E76BA1D2C26E310"}"},"total":10},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570886684404400920","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前看着这本书，没有什么毒点，有点好奇主角后面会咋样"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762738293,"group_id":"7529688064432540696","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"愿你的梦想，不仅仅是梦和想","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx4WobOwhQvwxlprv4BSNlMfDjusHfd2AxvOrEJBZ3z8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/05eb61463fa6497c8ef1188e06e2bafe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776615272&x-signature=CC1XbBoTcpK0G1IbTztlhhpZa%2Fc%3D","user_id":"1248677892983204","user_name":"别跟我抢饭盆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1248677892983204","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1657600796,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529688064432540696","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书】+【多女主】
偶然间穿越进一本名为《最强龙王纵横魔都》的小说的林枫，没想到自己居然穿成了贯穿全书的最大反派。本以为自己会就此过上被龙王主角装逼打脸，一路平推，最后横死街头的悲惨生活，却突然获得了一个日记本系统，系统告知他只要他每天专心写日记，就能获得奖励让自己变强！
更重要的是，只要他老老实实走完剧情，最后就可以回到自己原来的世界，而且自己获得的奖励全部都可以完整地带回去！
有了系统的保证，原本还感觉人生一片灰暗的林枫，顿时就又有了活下去的希望。
可当他开始不断地写下日记时，却发现原本的那些女主，怎么变得越来越不对劲起来了……？
楚无霜：“我才不要跟那个什么狗屁龙王！我就是要跟也是跟你！”
陈雅雯：“林枫，求求你，保护我好吗？我不想被那个龙王炼成人丹……”
南宫婉儿：“林哥哥！我才不要和那个臭男人在一起！人家要和你在一起嘛！”
林枫：“我是来当反派的，你们围着我转是要干什么？！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ai/d397551cb8773c66f4978ca4cccd9cfd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"时间的逃犯","author_id":"","book_id":"7529688064432540696","book_name":"穿书反派：女主们怎么都不对劲啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#888890","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2863人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529688087283106328","read_count":"2863","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"184370"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"83","tags":"男频衍生,衍生,系统,穿书,反派","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/d397551cb8773c66f4978ca4cccd9cfd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285640&x-signature=vS2BdqOhzRyVPtmsb%2BKOTqNuum4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3727764279537072","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122004082448E76BA1D2C26E310"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3917,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1422},"user_a
